description: Composition Light cream trousers made of 100% cotton with washed effect, that has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back, metal stud detailing, metal button closure on the front and loops on the waist to secure a belt Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash gentle Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Avoid soaking, remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on prints or embellishments Upgrade your casual style with these light cream pants from belmonte. The cotton fabric with the washed effect keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the modern cut of the trousers make it perfect for everyday wear. Team these with tees and slip-ons for a laid back look. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 44" Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”
